body:
This closes #756 

I tried to push Δt as large as I could, with this configuration, but it could only be doubled. Also running for longer time to see the interesting stuff happening in the output videos.

cc: @akshaysridhar

title: 2D rising thermal bubble: increase dt and final time

body:
This closes #758 

There are NO more stringent restrictions on `dt` or vertical resolution when switching to 3rd-order upwinding in this test case
